title: dianthus × loretii
intro: Dianthus × loretii, also known as Loretii Pink or Pink Pinks, is a hybrid flowering plant from the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its vibrant pink flowers and grass-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, which can help to heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Dianthus × loretii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Dianthus × loretii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
